text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Oguri Cap's first goal is to get her name out
there and gain more popularity, we decide to
enter a lot of different races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at a racecourse hosting a special
exhibition race, when...

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri! It's been a while!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you guys doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Oguri Cap's line of sight to find a group
of people waving and cheering excitedly.

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you look like you've had the shock of a
lifetime! Seems like our surprise was a big success!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I thought I'd wandered my way
back home by mistake.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! I forgot to introduce you. These are all
folks from my hometown.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let me introduce you to everyone. This is my
trainer, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She briefly introduces me, and they greet me very
warmly. The people from Oguri Cap's hometown
are just as kind as she always makes them out to
be.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You guys came all this way just to see me? It's
such a long trip...

text_block_list.name: Take
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Our Oguri's finally made her debut!
There's no way we could stay home in the sticks
twiddling our thumbs!

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
We all wanted to see you give it your all in a
central race, so we came to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the people from her hometown take turns
expressing their support, a smile gradually
appears on Oguri Cap's face. And then...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't that Oguri Cap over there? I heard that
absolutely no one stood a chance against her
back in Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but that was Kasamatsu. The Twinkle Series is in a whole other league.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, who do you think's gonna be in the next
race? I've got my hopes up for Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's gotta be Super Creek! I mean, she's...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Well then, I've gotta go and get ready.

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
A-all right... But hold on a minute, Oguri. Are you
okay?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Okay with what?

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
As long as you're fine, that's all that matters,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text:
You're more than welcome to come home if things
get too tough out here, you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Take
text_block_list.text:
We'll always be your loudest supporters! Make
sure to listen to us and no one else, all right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
U-uh, okay... Thank you? Today's just an
exhibition race though, so I hope you guys enjoy
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once Oguri Cap's hometown friends send us on
our way, I notice that she still looks puzzled—as if
she doesn't understand why they were so worried
about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that they probably heard some
thoughtless comments coming from the other
spectators.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... So that's why they were worried about me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
People will think what they want, so I just ignore
the negativity.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm... But I guess it's making everybody else
uneasy.
choice_data_list:
If you win, there'll be nothing to worry about
anymore!

If you win, there'll be nothing to worry about
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...That's true. Another reason for me enter lots of
races.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure everyone in this city acknowledges
me—I promise.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But first, I have to win this race and let everyone
know I'm doing okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Oguri Cap surges ahead in the
homestretch and, in a stunning victory, shows her
hometown supporters the true measure of her
skill.
